achievements.description: Defeat the Black Dragon, stop the Dark Songstress, and attain the title of Dragonmaster

achievements.description: Defeat the Shadow in the Talon Mine

achievements.description: Attempt to stop Taben's plans

achievements.description: Confront the Magic Emperor at the top of the Grindery

achievements.description: Obtain Althena's Sword and learn the truth

achievements.description: Defeat Royce

achievements.title: The Witch
achievements.description: Defeat Xenobia

achievements.title: The Corrupted
achievements.description: Defeat the Magic Emperor

achievements.title: The New Legendary Heroes
achievements.description: See things through until the very end

achievements.title: Best Fight He's Had in Ages
achievements.description: Beat Master Mel in a Duel
achievements.author: decimate

achievements.title: Did Someone Call a Plumber?
achievements.description: Defeat the Aqua Lizard without using Alex's Sword Dance
achievements.author: decimate

achievements.description: Defeat the Spark Fungus without using the Attack Command or Alex's Sword Dance

achievements.description: Defeat Dragonmaster Zoc without Healing any party members

achievements.title: They Should Have Sent a Real Boss
achievements.description: Defeat the Ultragoyles without using any Skills that damage multiple enemies at once

achievements.title: More Like Grand Dud
achievements.description: Defeat the Grand Doom without using Alex's Vigor, Sword Dance, Mia's Endow Shield, or Endow Weapon

achievements.title: Smelting Down Some Bronze
achievements.description: Defeat the Bronze Dogs without using any Art Skills or Group Heals
achievements.author: decimate

achievements.title: Mastery Over the Black Dragon
achievements.description: Defeat the Black Dragon without Consuming any Items

achievements.title: Without a Shadow of a Doubt
achievements.description: Defeat the Shadow without using Art Skills, Healing Spells, or Removing Silence
achievements.author: decimate

achievements.title: The IMmobile Magic Nasher
achievements.description: Defeat the Magic Masher without using Art Skills, Strength Enhancing Magic, or Group Heals
achievements.author: decimate

achievements.title: True Show of Power
achievements.description: Defeat the Magic Emperor without any party members being knocked out and without using Art Skills or Alex's Dragon Spells
achievements.author: decimate

achievements.title: Couldn't See Her Own Future
achievements.description: Defeat Royce without any party members being knocked out and without using Alex's Dragon Spells or Curing Status Effects

achievements.title: Sent Into the Abyss
achievements.description: Defeat Xenobia without any party members being knocked out and without using Art Skills or Alex's Dragon Spells
achievements.author: decimate

achievements.title: Even Wielding the Power of a God
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss without using Art skills, Alex's Dragon spells, spells that enhance strength, or consuming any items
